tower.translate: башня, вышка, крепость, опора, возвышаться, выситься, башенный
mnemonic: tower [та'уэ] башня - Тюрьма (Тауэ-р) - ещё и башня.

examples.eng: He towered over his mother.
How high is the Eiffel Tower?
The tower offers a panorama of the city.
a tower rising above the little town
The castle tower has been shot away.
examples.ru: Башня замка была разрушена орудийным залпом.

examples.eng: The tower is tilting
He stood at the foot of the tower.
The church tower is in need of repair.
Mozart towers over all other composers.
examples.ru: Моцарт возвышается над всеми другими композиторами.

examples.eng: The tower predominates over every object.
The clock on the church tower said nine o'clock.
examples.ru: Часы на церковной башне показывали девяти часов.

examples.eng: a little church with a squat tower
a tower aspiring towards the heavens
She had a tower of lace on her head.
examples.ru: У неё на голове была целая гора из кружев.

examples.eng: He was closely confined in the Tower.
examples.ru: Он находился в Тауэре в строгой изоляции.

examples.eng: The base of the tower was below grade.
examples.ru: Основание башни было ниже поверхности земли.

examples.eng: From the tower, you can see for miles.
examples.ru: Из башни видно на много миль.

examples.eng: The tower was designed by Gilbert Scott.
There is a door at the base of the tower.
The pilot radioed in to the control tower.
The tower is closed for reasons of safety.
Only the medieval tower had remained intact.
The next stop is Main Street and Tower Square.
the confusion of tongues at the Tower of Babel
The bell tower was added to the church in 1848.
examples.ru: Колокольня была добавлена к церкви в 1848 году.

examples.eng: We went to see the Eiffel Tower in the morning.
examples.ru: Утром мы пошли смотреть на Эйфелеву башню.

examples.eng: The Tower, Tower of London, His Majesty's Tower
'Tower block' is the British term for 'high-rise'.
The wall of the tower is still staunch and strong.
examples.ru: Стена башни ещё не потеряла своей прочности.

examples.eng: They did not carry this tower to the height it now is.
examples.ru: Они не достроили башню до той высоты, какую она имеет сейчас.
